as per r.27(a) and 27(c) of Part II of 1958 Rules r/w clarificatory 
letter dated 24.04.2010 with reference to r.8 of Appendix I to G.O.

Words and Phrases – ‘Transfer’; ‘option’; ‘absorb’; ‘absorption’ – 
Discussed.
